\tzpentry{ID4622}{Wavefunction Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4622 introduces Wavefunction Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ V_{ijk} := \frac{\partial^2 \psi}{\partial x_i \partial x_j} \otimes \omega_k \]
